tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name IN ('github_pull_requests', 'linear_issues')"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input:
{"sql":"SELECT pr.number, pr.closes_linear, li.state
FROM github_pull_requests pr
JOIN linear_issues li ON pr.closes_linear = li.id
WHERE pr.state = 'merged'
  AND li.state != 'done'"}
